Author: bdg
Name: CWLS Go To
Description: Watches Cross-world Linkshell (CWLS1/CWLS2) chat for messages containing a map link and appends a clickable [Go To] link. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest aetheryte via the Teleporter plugin, hopping to the correct world/data center first via the Lifestream plugin if the message points to a different server.
Punchline: Adds a working [Go To] link to CWLS map-link messages.
